result.summary: Skyia is a React/Vite frontend with a shared-hosting-compatible PHP/MySQL backend. The project includes AI integration, user authentication, and a game-like interface for interacting with an AI judge. The codebase is modular with services, components, and API endpoints.
result.suitability: Mistral can assist with auditing for dead code, unsafe debug code, stale references, and low-risk cleanup. The project structure is clear, and the provided files offer sufficient context for analysis.

proposed_actions.title: Audit and remove dead code
proposed_actions.why: Identify and remove unused functions, imports, or components to streamline the codebase.

proposed_actions.title: Review and secure debug code
proposed_actions.why: Ensure no unsafe debug code or logging is present in production, especially in API endpoints.

proposed_actions.title: Check for stale Firebase/Stripe/Gemini references
proposed_actions.why: Verify that all references to external services are up-to-date and correctly configured.

proposed_actions.title: General code cleanup
proposed_actions.why: Perform low-risk cleanup such as formatting, removing commented-out code, and optimizing imports.

cleanup_candidates.reason: Potential debug component that may contain unsafe logging or unused code.
Check for stale references to AI models or unused functions.
Review for any outdated or unused provider configurations.

security_candidates.reason: Ensure no debug code or unsafe logging is present in the main API endpoint.
Review authentication logic for potential security risks or debug code.
Check for proper handling of user keys and secrets.

docs_candidates.reason: Update design audit with any new findings or cleanup actions.
Document any security improvements or cleanup performed.

risks: Ensure no production secrets are exposed in the audit process.
Avoid modifying core logic without thorough testing.
Validate changes in a staging environment before deployment.
questions_for_user: Are there specific areas of the codebase you suspect may contain dead code or unsafe debug code?
Should we prioritize any particular external service references (Firebase/Stripe/Gemini) for review?
